_meta.name: okta-remove-user-from-group
_meta.description: Remove an Okta user from a group via the group detail page. The group detail page (/admin/group/{groupId}) shows current members with a remove-member-button per row. Requires groupId and userId.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-16

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

userId.description: Okta user ID (format: 00u{alphanumeric}698). Get from knownUserIds below.

groupId.description: Okta group ID (format: 00g{alphanumeric}). Get from knownGroupIds below.

anomalies: Remove button is on the GROUP DETAIL page (/admin/group/{groupId}), NOT the /members assign page
DOM: Remove button class is 'remove-member-button link-button link-button-icon icon-only' (confirmed 2026-04-16)
The /members page shows only non-members for assigning — members do NOT appear there
The 'Everyone' group cannot have members removed manually

chain.note: Navigate to group detail page (NOT /members). Current members shown here with remove buttons.
Wait for SPA to render member rows (needs extra time — table is empty until loaded)
Confirm group detail page loaded with member table. Target user should be in the table.
Click remove button (X icon) in target user's row. Class: remove-member-button
Verify removal. Target user's row should no longer appear in the group member table.
